source_pr.title: tests, ddl: move IT in `ddl/` to `tests/integrationtest` (Part 3)
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/47429

Problem Summary: move 55 test cases.

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.

evidence: files: ddl/ddl_error_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/index_modify_test.go, ddl/integration_test.go, ddl/modify_column_test.go, ddl/multi_schema_change_test.go, ddl/partition_test.go, ddl/primary_key_handle_test.go, ddl/reorg_partition_test.go, ddl/sequence_test.go, ddl/table_modify_test.go, ddl/tests/fail/BUILD.bazel, ddl/tests/fail/fail_db_test.go, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/ddl_error.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/fail_db.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/index_modify.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/integration.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/modify_column.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/multi_schema_change.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/partition.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/primary_key_handle.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/reorg_partition.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/sequence.result, tests/integrationtest/r/ddl/table_modify.result, tests/integrationtest/r/planner/cascades/integration.result, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/ddl_error.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/fail_db.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/index_modify.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/integration.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/modify_column.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/multi_schema_change.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/partition.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/primary_key_handle.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/reorg_partition.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/sequence.test, tests/integrationtest/t/ddl/table_modify.test, tests/integrationtest/t/planner/cascades/integration.test
